message:
feat(core,vdbe): bd-xb07w wire morsel INSERT dispatch + add writable_schema pragma field

Wire MorselScheduler from fsqlite-mvcc into production INSERT dispatch
for multi-row VALUES (>=64 rows) without triggers/FK/RETURNING/UPSERT.
Sequential execution through existing row-stream replay; morsel split
validates wiring for future parallel worker dispatch via asupersync.

Also adds writable_schema field to ConnectionPragmaState (unblocks
pre-existing compile errors from another agent's writable_schema DML).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
